name: IMMERSION CORP
business: Immersion Corporation licenses haptic technology that allows users to engage with products through touch, and through its consolidated variable interest entity Barnes & Noble Education, it operates physical and virtual bookstores for college and K-12 institutions.
sellsTo: OEMs in mobile communications, gaming, and automotive markets

exposures.sentence: Immersion is a premier licensing company focused on the acceleration, and scaling, through licensing, of innovative haptic technologies that allow people to use their sense of touch to engage with products and experience the digital world around them.
Our primary business is currently in the mobility, gaming, and automotive markets, and see opportunities in evolving new markets, including virtual and augmented reality and wearables.
Our primary business is currently in the mobility, gaming, and automotive markets, and see opportunities in evolving new markets, including virtual and augmented reality and wearables.
Barnes & Noble Education is one of the largest contract operators of physical and virtual bookstores for college and university campuses and K-12 institutions across the United States.
